subject: Gaming
title: Celeste: A Game About Mental Health
description: A quick, practical guide to Celeste: A Game About Mental Health.

hook.text: Celeste is about climbing a mountain. But the mountain is a metaphor for anxiety and depression.

buildup.text: Madeline, the protagonist, faces a dark reflection of herself. Her inner demon tries to stop her from climbing.

discovery.text: The gameplay mirrors the message. Failing is expected. Getting up and trying again is the point.

twist.text: Celeste includes an assist mode. The developers wanted everyone to experience the story regardless of skill.

climax.text: Players with anxiety and depression said Celeste helped them feel understood. A game became therapy.

punchline.text: Climb. Fall. Climb again. The mountain was never the real obstacle.

quiz.question: What does the mountain in Celeste metaphorically represent?
options: The struggle with anxiety and depression
